home.tagline: Interactive games platform for bars and home parties

auth.signupTagline: Tutti — launch your first blind test in 1 minute
auth.confirmEmailNotice: Confirm your email to activate the account, then sign in.

dashboard.tracksDescription: Listen, guess, score. With Spotify or our demo catalogue.
dashboard.quizzDescription: MCQ, true/false, free text, estimations. Bilingual FR/EN.

tracks.title: Tutti Tracks
tracks.searchHelp: Search by artist or title. Results come from your establishment's active provider.

playlists.emptyState: No playlists yet. Create your first one!
playlists.deleteConfirm: Delete this playlist? This action is permanent.
playlists.detailsEmpty: Select a track in the list to view its details and aliases.
playlists.aliasArtistHint: Variants accepted by voice recognition (synonyms, no accents, abbreviations…).
playlists.aliasTitleHint: Same rules: shorter versions, common mistakes, etc.
playlists.launchSession: Start a blind test with this playlist

sessionConfig.title: New blind test
sessionConfig.nameHint: Helps you find this game in history. Leave empty if you don't need it.
sessionConfig.modeTeamsHint: Players pick a team when they join.

host.title: Players are joining…
host.teamEmpty: No players on this team yet.
host.kickConfirm: Kick this player out of the session?
host.endBlindTestConfirm: End the blind test? Final podium will show.
host.noPlaylistsHint: No published playlists yet. Create one from Tutti Tracks or use 'Express playlist'.
host.expressHint: Create a playlist on the fly for this round, saved for later.
host.expressEmpty: No track yet. Search for an artist or title below.
host.gameLoopComingSoon: Game loop (track playback + buzz) coming in step 10. For now, end the round manually whenever you want.
host.noScoresYet: No score yet — play a round to start the leaderboard.
host.noTrackYet: Waiting for the track to start…

play.missingCode: Invalid link. Ask the host to scan the QR code.
play.notFound: Session not found. Check the code.
play.alreadyStarted: This game is already running or finished.
play.kicked: You have been kicked from the game.
play.pseudoTagline: Pick a nickname, it'll appear on the main screen.
play.waitingMessage: Hang tight — the host will start the game soon.
play.endedHint: Thanks for playing — see you next time.
play.waitingTrackHint: The host is about to start it.
play.listenAndBuzz: Listen… buzz when you know it!
play.buzzHint: First to buzz gets to answer.

onboarding.intro: 3 simple rules to score the most points.
onboarding.step1Body: When you recognize the song, tap the orange buzzer at the bottom of your screen.
onboarding.step2Title: Bring your phone close and say the artist
onboarding.step2Body: Speak the artist's name clearly near the mic. You have 3 seconds.
onboarding.step3Title: Add the title for a BONUS
onboarding.step3Body: Chain it with the title and you score +50 extra points.
onboarding.micConsent: We'll ask for mic access right after.
onboarding.condensedHint: You know the drill. Skipping the recap.
onboarding.micErrorBody: Tutti uses your mic to recognize your voice. Without access, you can't validate your answers.
onboarding.micErrorIos: Settings > Safari > Camera & Mic > tutti.app > Allow. Come back here and tap 'Retry'.
onboarding.micErrorAndroid: Tap the lock icon in the address bar > Permissions > Mic > Allow. Reload if needed.
onboarding.micErrorOther: Look for the mic permissions for tutti.app in your browser's settings, then enable access.

connection.toastMissedRound: You missed round {{round}} — here's the next one.

quizz.title: Tutti Quizz
quizz.comingSoon: Question pack creation and session launch — step 15 of the dev plan.
quizz.description: This section will let you create question packs, configure a bilingual session, and start a game.

settings.title: Establishment settings
settings.description: Customize the appearance and defaults of your establishment.
settings.establishmentNameHint: Shown across the app and on player screens.
settings.brandingLogoHint: PNG, JPG, WEBP or SVG. Max 2 MB.
settings.spotifyDescription: Connect your Spotify account to access the full catalogue and play full tracks (Premium account required for playback).

admin.upcomingSteps: Next steps in the dev plan: Pop Cocktail design system, Tutti Tracks and Tutti Quizz games…

responsive.tooSmallBody: Come back on a screen at least {{width}} wide.
responsive.tooSmallHint: To play a live session, open /play on your phone — everything is optimized.
